rationale: Improvement + Issue split from DRIVERS-2326; proactive spec-rollout work, driver not doing anything wrong.
Improvement + Issue split from DRIVERS-2309; new spec requirement rollout, not a driver nonconformance.
Issue split DRIVERS-1713; converting change stream spec tests from legacy format to Unified Test Format.
Improvement + Issue split DRIVERS-2285; new spec requirement rollout, not a pre-existing driver bug.
Improvement + Issue split DRIVERS-1915; new spec feature rollout for pre/post-images, not a nonconformance.
Improvement + Issue split DRIVERS-1853; new spec feature rollout for clustered indexes.
Driver always sends '$db': 'admin' to mongocryptd; CSFLE spec requires correct database namespace in encrypted commands.
Spec quoted verbatim: 'decryption MUST occur after generating a CommandSucceededEvent'; driver decrypts before.
Improvement + Issue split DRIVERS-2356; proactive spec-rollout update to removeKeyAltName behavior.
Issue split DRIVERS-2360; updating CSE prose test assertion to account for no-matching-documents case.
Bug + Issue split DRIVERS-2359; fixing runOnRequirement server version constraint in CSFLE spec tests.
Improvement + Issue split DRIVERS-2367; spec update making bulkWriteResult optional, driver not previously wrong.
Improvement + Issue split DRIVERS-2373; removing unnecessary credentials from CSE unified spec test files.
Improving error message quality for SRV URIs with port numbers; UX improvement, not a spec rule violation.
Improvement + Issue split DRIVERS-2382; updating expectResult: null in CSE unified spec test files.
Compiler warning reduction for misaligned address types; internal implementation, no spec behavior involved.
Description states spec mandates mongocryptd must not be spawned if crypt_shared successfully loaded; guard missing.
Improvement to expose crypt_shared API for wrapping drivers; no prior spec rule violated, missing capability.
Improvement + Issue split DRIVERS-2395; adding spec test asserting reads are not retried inside transactions.
Build error on Alpine Linux due to ssize_t/int64_t redefinition in bson-cmp.h; no spec behavior involved.
Improvement + Issue split DRIVERS-2276; adding RHEL 8 zSeries platform support, not a spec conformance issue.
Improvement + Issue split DRIVERS-2408; adding version guard for RewrapManyDataKey, not a pre-existing bug.
Build configuration change to disable ccache for old versions; no driver behavior or spec involved.
Improvement + Issue split DRIVERS-1490; new feature supporting AWS temporary credentials in CSFLE, not a bug.
NULL pointer dereference on error parameter in QE collection drop; implementation crash, no specific spec rule cited.
Fixing -Wformat compiler warnings on Windows; build/code quality, no spec behavior involved.
Command monitoring spec says connectionId is int32 but server sends int64; spec wrong, driver too strict; DRIVERS-2503 filed.
Issue split DRIVERS-2355; CI/Evergreen improvement to use consistent crypt_shared and server versions in testing.
Documentation bug: example code references error.msg instead of error.message; docs fix, no spec behavior.
Improvement + Issue split DRIVERS-2411; new feature adding Azure VM Managed Identity KMS support.
Sample code test expected count command error but server 5.0.9+ added count to Stable API; sample update needed.
Improvement + Issue split DRIVERS-2412; new SDAM spec requirement for >=6.0 servers, not a pre-existing bug.
Adding -Wstrict-prototypes compiler flag; code quality/build, no driver behavior or spec involved.
SDAM spec requires error reason when server marked UNKNOWN; driver omits bson_error_t on hello field type failure.
Improvement + Issue split DRIVERS-1975; new spec feature for C2C replication change stream visibility.
Improvement + Issue split DRIVERS-2344; new spec feature exposing rich updateDescription fields in change streams.
Build error on macOS M1 due to undeclared getpagesize() function; platform build issue, no spec behavior.
Adding internal BSON handling EDSL macro library; internal refactor/tooling, no spec conformance behavior changed.
Improvement + Issue split DRIVERS-2377; new feature adding GCP attached service account KMS support.
Bug + Issue split DRIVERS-2327; retryable writes spec requires propagating original error for NoWritesPerformed label.
Bug + Issue split DRIVERS-746; spec requires retrying operations when connection handshake fails; driver did not.
Improvement + Issue split DRIVERS-2489; adding spec test coverage for retryable handshake error scenarios.
Improvement + Issue split DRIVERS-2449; new spec requirement to not create MongoClient to mongocryptd if crypt_shared loaded.
Improvement + Issue split DRIVERS-2507; new spec requirement permitting tlsDisableOCSPEndpointCheck in KMS TLS options.
Improvement + Issue split DRIVERS-1983; updating load balancer spec test files for dedicated LB port support.
Ensuring stdout flushed before abort in test suite; internal test output reliability, not spec behavior.
HTTP test timeout connecting to example.com; CI infrastructure fix, no spec driver behavior involved.
Improvement + Issue split DRIVERS-2490; removing deprecated getNonce usage for 6.2+, new spec requirement.
Python setuptools CI failure due to virtualenv/distutils path prefix mismatch; build/CI tooling, no spec involved.
Avoiding aligned_alloc() on Windows; platform compatibility fix, no spec driver behavior involved.
